ops.title: cc-guides render rewrites CLAUDE.md and cc-guides.lock from upstream cc-skills sources, not just AGENTS.md
ops.body:
Running `cc-guides render` in getaway regenerates every guide it manages — AGENTS.md, CLAUDE.md, and `.claude/fragments/cc-guides.lock` — pulling CLAUDE.md content from upstream cc-skills sources. If upstream moved since the last render, unrelated CLAUDE.md churn (e.g. model-table refreshes) rides along with your fragment edit.

**Why:** a render for an AGENTS.md fragment edit produced a CLAUDE.md model-table rewrite (gpt-5.5 → gpt-5.6-sol/luna) that had nothing to do with the change being made.

**How to apply:** after `cc-guides render`, check `git status` for extra regenerated files; include them in the commit (they're legitimate regeneration — a PreToolUse hook requires fragment+artifact in one commit) but call the churn out in your report. Related: [[getaway-changelog-unreleased-practice]].
